_comment: Abdomen: liver, kidney_L, kidney_R, spleen, pancreas (6 classes incl. background).
_note_class_weights: Median-frequency balancing. Approx voxel fractions: liver~40%, kidney~5% each, spleen~8%, pancreas~0.5%. Run scripts/compute_class_weights.py to recompute from your training split and update this file with --update_config.
